[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 010010110 4
4 010001001 3
5 111101011 7
6 111111111 a
7 101111111 8

01 10 101111111 8 match 7
12 21 101110110 6
23 32 100111100 5
34 43 110101110 6
45 54 010111110 6
56 65 110111111 8
67 76 100111111 7
70 07 101101101 6

02 20 101111101 7
13 31 101111110 7
24 42 010110110 5
35 53 110111000 5
46 64 110111111 8
57 75 110111101 7
60 06 101111111 8 match 7
71 17 101111111 8 match 7

03 30 101101001 5
14 41 111110110 7
25 52 010011100 4
36 63 100111111 7
47 74 110101111 7
50 05 111111001 7
61 16 101111111 8 match 7
72 27 100111101 6

04 40 111101111 8
15 51 111111110 8
26 62 100111111 7
37 73 100101101 5
